message:
Fix feedback and alerts tour tooltip positioning

Change placement from 'bottom' to 'left' for feedback and alerts
tour steps to prevent tooltips from being cut off at the right edge
of the viewport when targeting navbar elements on the right side.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -111,15 +111,15 @@ const TOUR_STEPS: TourStep[] = [
     target: '[data-tour="feedback"]',
     title: 'Bug Reports & Feature Requests',
     content: 'Found a bug or have an idea? Click here to report issues or request new features. We track your feedback and notify you when updates are available.',
-    placement: 'bottom',
+    placement: 'left',
     highlight: true,
   },
   {
     id: 'alerts',
     target: '[data-tour="alerts"]',
     title: 'Alert Notifications',
     content: 'Monitor active alerts across all clusters. Click to see alert details, acknowledge them, or let Claude diagnose issues with AI-powered analysis.',
-    placement: 'bottom',
+    placement: 'left',
     highlight: true,
   },
 ]
